set.body:
Child of bd-01KXZQCRJQ02WXW3PRY5BTQY5K.

Goal: compute sparse output structure once and reuse it across changing numeric values.

Scope and acceptance:
- Add reusable plans for at least sparsity-pattern union and sparse matrix multiplication structure.
- Separate checked symbolic analysis from numeric evaluation.
- Produce deterministic canonical result patterns and typed errors for incompatible or changed inputs.
- Reuse precomputed index mappings and caller-owned destinations/workspaces across repeated evaluations.
- Preserve explicit-zero and pruning semantics from the pattern layer.
- Validate against dense oracles, randomized pattern laws, repeated numeric rebinding, and JVM/Scala.js allocation benchmarks.
- This issue does not include a sparse direct factorization implementation.
set.title: Add reusable symbolic sparse operation plans
